query:
SELECT 
  booking_count,
  COUNT(*) as customers
FROM (
  SELECT phone, COUNT(*) as booking_count
  FROM completed_jobs
  GROUP BY phone
) t
GROUP BY booking_count
ORDER BY booking_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
